events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1017. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Vegetable Egg Fried Rice
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 62 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Shrimp Chow Mein
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 61 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/800 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–55) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/800 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 40–55) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1017 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00 (Excelsior group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1017: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
